scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix rbac-service && npm install --prefix data-master-service && npm install --prefix transaksi-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "node api-gateway/index.js" "node auth-service/index.js" "node rbac-service/index.js" "node data-master-service/index.js" "node transaksi-service/index.js" "node frontend/node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js frontend"
